description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a gable roof and a modern suburban design. The exterior walls are clad in brown siding, and the house features multiple symmetrically arranged windows on both floors. A fenced backyard contains a cylindrical water tank, and the front is lined with a row of leafy green trees, providing privacy and shade. The property is bordered by a wooden fence, and the house is situated alongside a paved road with a driveway. The landscaping includes grass lawns and a few scattered shrubs, contributing to a well-maintained suburban appearance.
description: A modern two-story brown house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, fenced yard, and tree-lined frontage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, symmetrical windows, and a row of trees obscuring the lower part of the house.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the gable roof, driveway, and the arrangement of two similar houses separated by a road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, cylindrical water tank, and the back windows of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable roof, side windows, and the continuation of the road and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with small steps, flanked by windows and shaded by overhanging trees
